interface.editor: Python is usually written in Replit or VS Code. In Replit, the 'Run' button executes the main.py file.
interface.syntax: Indentation is not optional; it defines the blocks of code.

technical_constraints.data_types: Strings (text) must be inside quotes. Integers are whole numbers. Floats have decimals.
technical_constraints.loops: Use 'for i in range(10):' to repeat code a specific number of times.

tips: The command 'print()' is essential to see what your program is doing.
Input from the user always comes as a string. Use 'int()' to convert it if you need a number.
